subject: feat(css): add no-print media query rule
body:
The no-print class was applied to BurgerMenu per BURGER_MENU pattern
but had no corresponding CSS rule. Added @media print rule so the
class actually hides elements when users Ctrl+P the page.

Updated TODO.md — no-print rule done, remaining print CSS (white bg,
break-inside) tracked separately.
